title: SandboxAuditRecord
description: Audit log record for sandbox policy decisions. Implements: docs/contracts-canonical.md §6; sandbox execution audit trail

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the policy decision

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the bounded run execution

tool_id.description: Tool identifier (ToolManifest.tool_id) if applicable, null for non-tool checks

args_summary.description: Sanitized argument summary for audit trail; MUST NOT contain raw secrets/tokens

result_exit_code.description: Process exit code for command executions; null for non-command checks

duration_ms.description: Execution duration in milliseconds; null if not applicable or incomplete

reason.description: Human-readable reason for deny decisions; OPTIONAL for allow decisions
